answers.label: Fixing, repairing, and maintaining things with my hands
Analytical — I like logic, data, and figuring out how things work

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in automotive electrician to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Automotive Electrical System Training
Automotive Electrical Course - Beginners to Intermediate
EVs & Hybrids: Introduction to Electric & Hybrid Vehicles
Electric and Hybrid Vehicles Specialization
Electric and Hybrid Vehicle Engineering Professional Certificate

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in vehicle electrical system diagnosis, wiring loom installation and repair, and in-car entertainment and electronics installation — these are the essential building blocks for a automotive electrician

resources.title: Automotive Electrical System Diagnostics Training (Udemy)
ScannerDanner - Automotive Diagnostic Videos (YouTube Channel)
How To Install Car Stereo & Car Alarm Systems (Udemy)
Automotive Electrical and Electronic Systems Training (Udemy)

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in battery and charging system servicing, ecu diagnostics, and ev and hybrid vehicle electrical systems, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Udemy Course Search: Automotive Electrical System Advanced Diagnostics
Udemy Course Search: Hybrid and Electric Vehicle Technology Training
WeberAuto - Advanced Automotive Technology Explanations (YouTube Channel)
ScannerDanner - Real-World Automotive Electrical & ECU Diagnostics (YouTube Channel)
Coursera: Electric Cars: Technology (Delft University of Technology)

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing hands-on repair jobs, maintenance projects, or workshop-based practical exercises — focus on applying vehicle electrical system diagnosis, and wiring loom installation and repair in realistic scenarios

resources.title: Automotive Electrical System Diagnosis & Repair Courses on Udemy
ScannerDanner - Automotive Electrical Diagnostics (YouTube Channel)
Professional Certificate in Electric & Hybrid Vehicles (edX)
South Main Auto Repair LLC - Real-World Automotive Diagnostics (YouTube Channel)
In-Car Entertainment & Aftermarket Electronics Installation Courses on Udemy

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Document your completed projects with photos, descriptions, and client feedback — create a simple portfolio or logbook showcasing certifications and hands-on work

resources.title: Automotive Electrical System Diagnostics & Repair Courses (Udemy Search)
Electric Vehicle Fundamentals (IIT Delhi on Coursera)
Automotive Electrical Diagnostics & Repair (ScannerDanner YouTube Channel)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your automotive electrician skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

milestones.description: Apply for automotive electrician positions through trade job boards, local businesses, staffing agencies, or apprenticeship programs — bring your certifications and documented experience to interviews
